# Templates

This folder contains reusable templates for client-facing documents.

## Planned templates

- `proposal-template.md` — Standard project proposal
- `scope-document.md` — Project scope and deliverables agreement
- `onboarding-checklist.md` — New client onboarding steps
- `handover-document.md` — System handover template
- `case-study-template.md` — Portfolio case study format

*(Templates will be added as each is needed and finalised)*
